subject: docs(test): flag sync point between tripwire literals and REPLACEMENTS
body:
Two-line comment so a future maintainer adding or removing an icon <link>
tag in index.html updates both the test literal list and REPLACEMENTS in
vite.config.ts, not just one.

Tags: pwa, test, docs
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: icon-cache-bust
Semver: patch
